checks.detail: solution/solve.sh, oracle.yaml, and job.yaml all present.
All required fields present and within limits.
git and tmux are installed via apt-get.
tests/ contains extra files beyond test.sh.
reasons: compute_reward.py and run_all.py should live in environment/tests/ and be COPYed into the Docker image
ANTI_CHEAT.md is not part of the Harbor task spec and no .gitignore exists to exclude it

notes: Move tests/compute_reward.py and tests/run_all.py into environment/tests/ and COPY them into /tests/ in the Dockerfile, leaving only test.sh at tests/.
Remove or relocate ANTI_CHEAT.md from the task root, or add a .gitignore to exclude developer notes.
